framework_source: DoD Cyber Workforce Framework Work Role Tool v5.1 (2025-07-25)

mappings.fde_description: Acquire and maintain a working knowledge of constitutional issues relevant laws, regulations, policies, agreements, standards, procedures, or other issuances.
mappings.ref_statement: Ability to translate complex regulatory requirements into clear, actionable organizational policies and operational procedures that non-legal staff can implement and verify.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-A-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-K-005 (RC, cosine: 0.499), SP-K-004 (SP, cosine: 0.498).

mappings.fde_description: Acquire and manage the necessary resources, including leadership support, financial resources, and key security personnel, to support information technology (IT) security goals and objectives and reduce overall organizational risk.
mappings.ref_statement: Develop and maintain AI security standards for the enterprise, including training data provenance requirements, model registry controls, and LLM application security requirements.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-010 (LS, cosine: 0.490), SP-S-003 (SP, cosine: 0.483).

mappings.fde_description: Acquire and manage the necessary resources, including leadership support, financial resources, infrastructure, and key personnel, to support AI innovation adoption goals and objectives.
mappings.ref_statement: Ability to evaluate and adopt new technologies, frameworks, and tools for data and AI work, assessing maturity, community support, integration requirements, and organizational fit before recommending adoption.
mappings.notes: DCWF task equal WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-018 (AI, cosine: 0.656), DG-T-002 (DG, cosine: 0.654).

mappings.fde_description: Acquire necessary resources, including financial resources, to conduct an effective enterprise continuity of operations program.
mappings.ref_statement: Develop and maintain the enterprise data and AI strategy, aligned to business objectives, with defined investment priorities, milestones, accountability assignments, and success metrics.
mappings.notes: DCWF task superset of WIDAI DG domain. DG-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-006 (DG, cosine: 0.543), LS-T-005 (LS, cosine: 0.540).

mappings.fde_description: Administer test bed(s), and test and evaluate applications, hardware infrastructure, rules/signatures, access controls, and configurations of platforms managed by service provider(s).
mappings.ref_statement: Manage data platform access controls, including role definitions, permission grants, access reviews, and privilege escalation procedures.
mappings.notes: DCWF task superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-015 (AI, cosine: 0.557), DA-S-007 (DA, cosine: 0.547).

mappings.fde_description: Coordinate with system administrators to create cyber defense tools, test bed(s), and test and evaluate applications, hardware infrastructure, rules/signatures, access controls, and configurations of platforms managed by service provider(s).
mappings.ref_statement: Provision, configure, and maintain the data platform infrastructure, including compute environments, storage systems, networking, and security controls.
mappings.notes: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-015 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-008 (SP, cosine: 0.547), SP-T-001 (SP, cosine: 0.540).

mappings.fde_description: Manage the indexing/cataloguing, storage, and access of explicit organizational knowledge (e.g., hard copy documents, digital files).
mappings.ref_statement: Skill in operating a data catalog platform, including configuring connectors, reviewing harvested metadata, curating business context, and managing access.
mappings.notes: DCWF task equal WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-006 (DG, cosine: 0.624), DQ-K-010 (DQ, cosine: 0.592).

mappings.fde_description: Advise senior management (e.g., CIO) on risk levels and security posture.
mappings.ref_statement: Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including policy development, role and responsibility definition, escalation protocols, exception management, and board-level model risk reporting.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-T-007 (RM, cosine: 0.529), RM-A-003 (RM, cosine: 0.516).

mappings.fde_description: Advise senior management on risk levels, security posture, and necessary changes to existing AI policies.​
mappings.ref_statement: Develop and present executive-level data and AI strategy recommendations, including business case, risk assessment, and implementation sequencing rationale.
mappings.notes: DCWF task equal WIDAI RM domain. RM-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-010 (SP, cosine: 0.645), AG-K-002 (AG, cosine: 0.635).

mappings.fde_description: Advise senior management (e.g., CIO) on cost/benefit analysis of information security programs, policies, processes, systems, and elements.
mappings.ref_statement: Skill in conducting and reviewing Data Protection Impact Assessments, identifying processing activities that present high risk to individuals, and recommending proportionate technical and organizational measures to mitigate identified risks.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-009 (OP, cosine: 0.435), DA-S-008 (DA, cosine: 0.433).

mappings.fde_description: Advise appropriate senior leadership or Authorizing Official of changes affecting the organization's cybersecurity posture.
mappings.ref_statement: Monitor and analyze regulatory developments, enforcement actions, and supervisory authority guidance relevant to organizational data and AI activities, producing impact assessments and recommended responses.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-001 (LS, cosine: 0.461), SP-T-006 (SP, cosine: 0.425).

mappings.fde_description: Advocate organization's official position in legal and legislative proceedings.
mappings.ref_statement: Produce analytical documentation that meets the evidence standard required for regulatory, audit, or executive decision support contexts.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-S-002 (RC, cosine: 0.400), SP-T-007 (SP, cosine: 0.394).

mappings.fde_description: Analyze and define data requirements and specifications.
mappings.ref_statement: Skill in conducting data consumer discovery, translating consumer data needs into data product requirements with defined quality, freshness, and access standards.
mappings.notes: DCWF task superset of WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-S-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-014 (DQ, cosine: 0.627), DQ-S-003 (DQ, cosine: 0.596).

mappings.fde_description: Implement data management standards, requirements, and specifications.
mappings.ref_statement: Define enterprise data integration standards, including interface contracts, schema evolution policies, API versioning standards, and event schema governance.
mappings.notes: DCWF task equal WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-T-001 (DA, cosine: 0.675), DQ-T-015 (DQ, cosine: 0.662).

mappings.fde_description: Analyze and plan for anticipated changes in data capacity requirements.
mappings.ref_statement: Conduct capacity planning for data infrastructure, including growth projection analysis, resource utilization trending, and scaling recommendations aligned with business demand forecasts.
mappings.notes: DCWF task superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-T-007 (TF, cosine: 0.637), AI-T-014 (AI, cosine: 0.627).

mappings.fde_description: Analyze computer-generated threats for counter intelligence or criminal activity.
mappings.ref_statement: Conduct threat model assessments for AI systems, identifying AI-specific attack surfaces, threat actors, and applicable mitigating controls.
mappings.notes: DCWF task superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-S-002 (RM, cosine: 0.565), RM-K-005 (RM, cosine: 0.511).

mappings.fde_description: Analyze information to determine, recommend, and plan the development of a new application or modification of an existing application.
mappings.ref_statement: Execute analytical requests from business stakeholders, including data extraction, transformation, analysis, and delivery of findings with documented methodology.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-001 (OP, cosine: 0.503), TF-A-003 (TF, cosine: 0.489).

mappings.fde_description: Analyze and provide information to stakeholders that will support the development of security a application or modification of an existing security application.
mappings.ref_statement: Execute analytical requests from business stakeholders, including data extraction, transformation, analysis, and delivery of findings with documented methodology.
mappings.notes: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-A-005 (DG, cosine: 0.488), SP-T-001 (SP, cosine: 0.468).

mappings.fde_description: Analyze organizational cyber policy.
mappings.ref_statement: Monitor and analyze regulatory developments, enforcement actions, and supervisory authority guidance relevant to organizational data and AI activities, producing impact assessments and recommended responses.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-005 (SP, cosine: 0.450), DG-K-008 (DG, cosine: 0.426).

mappings.fde_description: Analyze organization's cybersecurity policies and configurations and evaluate compliance with regulations and organizational directives.
mappings.ref_statement: Monitor and analyze regulatory developments, enforcement actions, and supervisory authority guidance relevant to organizational data and AI activities, producing impact assessments and recommended responses.
mappings.notes: DCWF task superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-A-005 (RC, cosine: 0.568), SP-T-006 (SP, cosine: 0.550).

mappings.fde_description: Analyze the results of software, hardware, or interoperability testing.
mappings.ref_statement: Design and execute AI system test and evaluation programs, producing documented test plans, results, identified failure modes, and deployment recommendations.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-005 (TF, cosine: 0.527), TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.523).

mappings.fde_description: Analyze user needs and requirements to plan architecture.
mappings.ref_statement: Develop and maintain program plans for data and AI initiatives, including scope definition, workstream structure, milestone schedule, resource plan, and risk register.
mappings.notes: DCWF task superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-A-001 (DA, cosine: 0.488), DA-T-001 (DA, cosine: 0.476).

mappings.fde_description: Analyze user needs and software requirements to determine feasibility of design within time and cost constraints.
mappings.ref_statement: Ability to design technical implementations that balance immediate delivery requirements with long-term maintainability, scalability, and operational sustainability.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-A-001 (DA, cosine: 0.460), DQ-A-004 (DQ, cosine: 0.457).

mappings.fde_description: Analyze security needs and software requirements to determine feasibility of design within time and cost constraints and security mandates.
mappings.ref_statement: Ability to design security and privacy architectures that enable data utility and AI innovation while maintaining protection levels appropriate to the data sensitivity and regulatory context.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-008 (SP, cosine: 0.452), SP-K-003 (SP, cosine: 0.449).

mappings.fde_description: Analyze design constraints, analyze trade-offs and detailed system and security design, and consider lifecycle support.
mappings.ref_statement: Ability to design technical implementations that balance immediate delivery requirements with long-term maintainability, scalability, and operational sustainability.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-002 (DA, cosine: 0.472), DA-T-009 (DA, cosine: 0.452).

mappings.fde_description: Analyze design constraints, analyze trade-offs and security design, and consider lifecycle support.
mappings.ref_statement: Ability to design technical implementations that balance immediate delivery requirements with long-term maintainability, scalability, and operational sustainability.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-S-002 (DA, cosine: 0.462), DQ-T-011 (DQ, cosine: 0.427).

mappings.fde_description: Apply coding and testing standards, apply security testing tools including "fuzzing" static-analysis code scanning tools, and conduct code reviews.
mappings.ref_statement: Conduct code reviews for data application changes, evaluating code quality, test coverage, performance implications, documentation completeness, and adherence to team coding standards.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-005 (TF, cosine: 0.496), AI-S-005 (AI, cosine: 0.472).

mappings.fde_description: Apply secure code documentation.
mappings.ref_statement: Develop and maintain operational documentation for data systems, including standard operating procedures, runbooks, escalation matrices, and knowledge base articles.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-T-008 (RM, cosine: 0.399), AI-T-002 (AI, cosine: 0.377).

mappings.fde_description: Apply security policies to applications that interface with one another, such as Business-to-Business (B2B) applications.
mappings.ref_statement: Implement AI application security controls, including prompt injection defenses, output filtering, access controls, and audit logging.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-002 (RC, cosine: 0.450), SP-T-005 (SP, cosine: 0.431).

mappings.fde_description: Apply security policies to meet security objectives of the system.
mappings.ref_statement: Implement AI application security controls, including prompt injection defenses, output filtering, access controls, and audit logging.
mappings.notes: DCWF task superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.505), SP-T-010 (SP, cosine: 0.497).

mappings.fde_description: Apply service oriented security architecture principles to meet organization's confidentiality, integrity, and availability requirements.
mappings.ref_statement: Knowledge of IT service management principles as applied to data services, including service catalog design, service level management, incident and problem management, and continual service improvement.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-K-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.499), SP-A-002 (SP, cosine: 0.489).

mappings.fde_description: Apply security architecture principles to meet organization’s confidentiality, integrity, and availability requirements.
mappings.ref_statement: Ability to design security and privacy architectures that enable data utility and AI innovation while maintaining protection levels appropriate to the data sensitivity and regulatory context.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-010 (SP, cosine: 0.521), DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.511).

mappings.fde_description: Assess policy needs and collaborate with stakeholders to develop policies to govern cyber activities.
mappings.ref_statement: Establish, communicate, and enforce enterprise-wide data and AI policies covering quality, privacy, security, ethics, and responsible use.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-008 (RC, cosine: 0.464), DG-T-004 (DG, cosine: 0.460).

mappings.fde_description: Assess the effectiveness of cybersecurity measures utilized by system(s).
mappings.ref_statement: Skill in conducting security assessments of data platforms and AI systems, including vulnerability identification, penetration testing coordination, and security architecture review.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-T-002 (RM, cosine: 0.414), RM-S-002 (RM, cosine: 0.400).

mappings.fde_description: Assess threats to and vulnerabilities of computer system(s) to develop a security risk profile.
mappings.ref_statement: Skill in conducting security assessments of data platforms and AI systems, including vulnerability identification, penetration testing coordination, and security architecture review.
mappings.notes: DCWF task superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-001 (SP, cosine: 0.547), SP-K-012 (SP, cosine: 0.530).

mappings.fde_description: Develop content for cyber defense tools.
mappings.ref_statement: Implement AI application security controls, including prompt injection defenses, output filtering, access controls, and audit logging.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-A-003 (SP, cosine: 0.486), RM-S-002 (RM, cosine: 0.469).

mappings.fde_description: Gather and preserve evidence used on the prosecution of computer crimes.
mappings.ref_statement: Maintain Records of Processing Activities, including processing purposes, data categories, recipient categories, transfer records, retention periods, and technical and organizational security measures descriptions.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-010 (AB, cosine: 0.447), RC-T-005 (RC, cosine: 0.439).

mappings.fde_description: Build, test, and modify product prototypes using working models or theoretical models.
mappings.ref_statement: Knowledge of innovation program design, including ideation methods, prototype development approaches, value hypothesis construction, and stage-gate evaluation criteria.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-K-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-004 (LS, cosine: 0.525), DA-S-004 (DA, cosine: 0.493).

mappings.fde_description: Build, assess, and modify product prototypes using working models or theoretical models.
mappings.ref_statement: Knowledge of innovation program design, including ideation methods, prototype development approaches, value hypothesis construction, and stage-gate evaluation criteria.
mappings.notes: DCWF task superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-K-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-T-004 (LS, cosine: 0.533), DA-S-004 (DA, cosine: 0.499).

mappings.fde_description: Capture security controls used during the requirements phase to integrate security within the process, to identify key security objectives, and to maximize software security while minimizing disruption to plans and schedules.
mappings.ref_statement: Implement AI application security controls, including prompt injection defenses, output filtering, access controls, and audit logging.
mappings.notes: DCWF task superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-T-010 (DA, cosine: 0.523), OP-T-002 (OP, cosine: 0.504).

mappings.fde_description: Characterize and analyze network traffic to identify anomalous activity and potential threats to network resources.
mappings.ref_statement: Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP, DNS resolution, HTTP/HTTPS protocols, firewall and security group configurations, load balancing, and how network architecture affects data pipeline design and performance.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-T-009 (DA, cosine: 0.382), RM-T-002 (RM, cosine: 0.363).

mappings.fde_description: Check system hardware availability, functionality, integrity, and efficiency.
mappings.ref_statement: Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues that span multiple system layers, tracing problems across application code, data pipelines, databases, networks, and infrastructure to identify and remediate root causes.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-T-009 (DA, cosine: 0.503), AI-T-004 (AI, cosine: 0.455).

mappings.fde_description: Collect and analyze intrusion artifacts (e.g., source code, malware, and system configuration) and use discovered data to enable mitigation of potential cyber defense incidents within the enterprise.
mappings.ref_statement: Implement AI application security controls, including prompt injection defenses, output filtering, access controls, and audit logging.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-010 (SP, cosine: 0.546), SP-T-005 (SP, cosine: 0.526).

mappings.fde_description: Collect and maintain data needed to meet system cybersecurity reporting.
mappings.ref_statement: Develop and maintain AI security standards for the enterprise, including training data provenance requirements, model registry controls, and LLM application security requirements.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-006 (RC, cosine: 0.505), RC-T-010 (RC, cosine: 0.498).

mappings.fde_description: Communicate the value of information technology (IT) security throughout all levels of the organization stakeholders.
mappings.ref_statement: Skill in communicating data quality and data trust issues to non-technical executive stakeholders in terms of business risk and operational impact.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-S-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-A-004 (SP, cosine: 0.530), DG-A-005 (DG, cosine: 0.530).

mappings.fde_description: Compile and write documentation of program development and subsequent revisions, inserting comments in the coded instructions so others can understand the program.
mappings.ref_statement: Skill in writing technical documentation for data systems, including architecture diagrams, API specifications, operational runbooks, data dictionaries, and troubleshooting guides that enable team independence.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-S-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-010 (OP, cosine: 0.530), TF-T-006 (TF, cosine: 0.497).

mappings.fde_description: Conduct analysis of log files, evidence, and other information in order to determine best methods for identifying the perpetrator(s) of a network intrusion.
mappings.ref_statement: Implement AI application security controls, including prompt injection defenses, output filtering, access controls, and audit logging.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-012 (TF, cosine: 0.434), DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.402).

mappings.fde_description: Conduct analysis of log files, evidence, and other information in order to determine best methods for identifying the perpetrator(s) of a network intrusion or other crimes.
mappings.ref_statement: Implement AI application security controls, including prompt injection defenses, output filtering, access controls, and audit logging.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-012 (TF, cosine: 0.452), DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.443).

mappings.fde_description: Conduct and/or support authorized penetration testing on enterprise network assets.
mappings.ref_statement: Skill in conducting security assessments of data platforms and AI systems, including vulnerability identification, penetration testing coordination, and security architecture review.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-009 (DG, cosine: 0.433), DG-T-013 (DG, cosine: 0.433).

mappings.fde_description: Conduct framing of pleadings to properly identify alleged violations of law, regulations, or policy/guidance.
mappings.ref_statement: Skill in interpreting regulatory text, supervisory guidance, and enforcement decisions, translating legal requirements into operational controls and measurable organizational obligations.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-S-006 (RC, cosine: 0.459), RC-S-005 (RC, cosine: 0.458).

mappings.fde_description: Conduct functional and connectivity testing to ensure continuing operability.
mappings.ref_statement: Conduct periodic data compliance assessments, documenting findings, evidence, risk ratings, and remediation assignments.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-003 (AI, cosine: 0.386), RC-T-011 (RC, cosine: 0.373).

mappings.fde_description: Conduct interactive training exercises to create an effective learning environment.
mappings.ref_statement: Knowledge of adult learning design principles, including learning objectives, instructional design methods, knowledge retention research, and blended learning delivery models.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-004 (OP, cosine: 0.440), OP-S-002 (OP, cosine: 0.423).

mappings.fde_description: Conduct interviews of victims and witnesses and conduct interviews or interrogations of suspects.
mappings.ref_statement: Skill in preparing regulatory examination evidence packages, including control narratives, policy documentation, audit trails, and supporting artifacts that demonstrate compliance to examiner standards.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-003 (RC, cosine: 0.412), RC-T-011 (RC, cosine: 0.403).

mappings.fde_description: Conduct periodic system maintenance including cleaning (both physically and electronically), disk checks, routine reboots, data dumps, and testing.
mappings.ref_statement: Execute routine data platform maintenance tasks, including storage cleanup, job configuration updates, and operational documentation maintenance.
mappings.notes: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-021 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.522), OP-T-007 (OP, cosine: 0.494).

mappings.fde_description: Conduct Privacy Impact Assessments (PIA) of the application’s security design for the appropriate security controls, which protect the confidentiality and integrity of Personally Identifiable Information (PII).
mappings.ref_statement: Skill in conducting privacy impact assessments (PIAs) and data protection impact assessments (DPIAs) for new data processing activities and AI systems.
mappings.notes: DCWF task superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-S-004 (RC, cosine: 0.567), SP-T-008 (SP, cosine: 0.555).

mappings.fde_description: Conduct risk analysis, feasibility study, and/or trade-off analysis to develop, document, and refine functional requirements and specifications.
mappings.ref_statement: Conduct DPIAs for new or materially changed data processing activities, documenting risks, mitigations, and residual risk acceptance decisions.
mappings.notes: DCWF task superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-012 (RC, cosine: 0.559), AB-T-009 (AB, cosine: 0.545).

mappings.fde_description: Conduct trial runs of programs and software applications to ensure the desired information is produced and instructions and security levels are correct.
mappings.ref_statement: Skill in designing clinical trial databases, including case report form development, edit check logic specification, data validation rules, and the traceability documentation required for regulatory inspection and audit.
mappings.notes: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-A-005 (RC, cosine: 0.510), RC-T-001 (RC, cosine: 0.505).

mappings.fde_description: Confer with systems analysts, engineers, programmers, and others to design application and to obtain information on project limitations and capabilities, performance requirements, and interfaces.
mappings.ref_statement: Skill in writing technical documentation for data systems, including architecture diagrams, API specifications, operational runbooks, data dictionaries, and troubleshooting guides that enable team independence.
mappings.notes: DCWF task superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-S-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-001 (TF, cosine: 0.539), AB-K-006 (AB, cosine: 0.493).

mappings.fde_description: Configure and optimize network hubs, routers, and switches (e.g., higher-level protocols, tunneling).
mappings.ref_statement: Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP, DNS resolution, HTTP/HTTPS protocols, firewall and security group configurations, load balancing, and how network architecture affects data pipeline design and performance.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-015 (AI, cosine: 0.459), DA-T-009 (DA, cosine: 0.404).

mappings.fde_description: Confirm what is known about an intrusion and discover new information, if possible, after identifying intrusion via dynamic analysis.
mappings.ref_statement: Implement model monitoring and observability systems that detect data drift, prediction drift, and performance degradation, triggering alerts or automated retraining workflows when defined thresholds are exceeded.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-017 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-001 (SP, cosine: 0.424), DQ-T-014 (DQ, cosine: 0.410).

mappings.fde_description: Construct access paths to suites of information (e.g., link pages) to facilitate access by end-users.
mappings.ref_statement: Knowledge of data platform access management processes, including access request intake, provisioning workflows, access review cycles, and deprovisioning procedures.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-016 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-T-010 (DA, cosine: 0.459), DG-T-013 (DG, cosine: 0.453).

mappings.fde_description: Develop threat model based on customer interviews and requirements.
mappings.ref_statement: Skill in conducting and reviewing Data Protection Impact Assessments, identifying processing activities that present high risk to individuals, and recommending proportionate technical and organizational measures to mitigate identified risks.
mappings.notes: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-S-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-S-001 (RM, cosine: 0.454), RM-S-008 (RM, cosine: 0.451).

mappings.fde_description: Consult with customers to evaluate functional requirements.
mappings.ref_statement: Ability to design technical implementations that balance immediate delivery requirements with long-term maintainability, scalability, and operational sustainability.

mappings.notes: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-K-003 (TF, cosine: 0.634), RC-K-006 (RC, cosine: 0.574).

mappings.fde_description: Knowledge of vulnerabilities of various encryption systems.

mappings.fde_description: Ability to implement Zero Trust security in DoD Systems/Software.

mappings.fde_description: Ability to measure human systems interaction (usability, workload, system trust).
